apply_date.text: วันที่สมัคร

root.sql: select sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no /*เลขที่คำขอ*/ ,pka_mem_newmem.fp_member_name(sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no) as memname /*ชื่อ - นามสกุล*/ ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date , 'dd month yyyy') as apply_date_tdate /*วันที่ขอสมัครสมาชิก*/ ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext( sc_mem_m_application_form.date_of_birth ) as age /*อายุ*/ ,decode(sc_mem_m_application_form.sex,'M',1,0) as sex_m /*จำนวนผู้ชาย*/ ,decode(sc_mem_m_application_form.sex,'M',0,1) as sex_f /*จำนวนผู้หญิง*/ ,sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date /*วันที่ขอสมัคร*/ ,sc_mem_m_application_form.entry_id /*ผู้ทำรายการ*/ ,sc_mem_m_app_work_info.salary_amount /*เงินเดือน*/ ,sc_mem_m_app_share.share_monthly /*ส่งหุ้น/เดือน*/ ,pka_mem.fp_desc_position(sc_mem_m_app_work_info.position_code ) as position_name /*ตำแหน่ง*/ ,sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code ,pka_mem.fp_desc_appType(sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code ) as appl_type_name /*ประเภทการสมัคร*/ ,sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type ,pka_mem.fp_desc_memType(sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type ) as mem_type_desc /*ประเภทสมาชิก*/ ,sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no /*รหัสสังกัด*/ ,pka_mem.fp_desc_memGroup(sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no) as member_group_name /*ชื่อสังกัด*/ ,(select membership_no from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no) as membership_no from sc_mem_m_application_form ,sc_mem_m_app_work_info ,sc_mem_m_app_share where ( sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_app_work_info.application_form_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_app_share.application_form_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.cancel_status = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date , sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type , sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code , sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no
